symbols: large painted eyes in window — sight, observation, and the act of seeing
sign reading 'Optica Moderna' — modern vision and the lens of perception
reflections in glass — layered realities and the interplay of interior and exterior
word 'Spirito' on storefront — spirit, an evocative juxtaposition with physical sight
description: A black-and-white photograph of the facade of an optical shop. The storefront sign reads 'Optica Moderna' and 'Gran Fabrica de Lentes y Anteojos.' A hanging oval sign displays a painted eye with the text 'La Optica Moderna' and 'E. Spirito.' The large shop windows contain multiple oversized painted or printed images of human eyes at various scales, creating a surreal, watching effect. Reflections in the glass overlay the eye images with street scenes. The name 'Spirito' appears on the lower facade. The composition is sharp and high-contrast, typical of mid-twentieth-century art photography.
